summary: This is a minimal announcement post for Stack Overflow Podcast episode 26, where Joel Spolsky and Jeff Atwood answer listener questions. The post contains virtually no substantive content beyond a link to the podcast episode. It serves purely as a cross-posting notification on Joel's blog to direct readers to the Stack Overflow blog where the full podcast notes reside.
key_points: Episode 26 of the Stack Overflow podcast focused on answering listener questions
The post is a brief cross-promotion linking to the Stack Overflow blog
Joel and Jeff Atwood co-hosted the podcast as part of building the Stack Overflow community
money_quotes: Jeff and I devote the episode to questions from listeners.
key_insight: This is a stub announcement post with no substantive content to analyze beyond its role as a podcast cross-promotion.
